hero.titleLead: Run your entire freelance business from
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one freelance dashboard: Upwork, Fiverr, Malt and LinkedIn together, revenue optimized by AI, deadlines in sync. Take back control of your career.
hero.microcopy: No credit card · Set up in 2 minutes
hero.geo: Voraly is a freelance dashboard that centralizes Upwork, Fiverr, Malt and LinkedIn, generates an AI growth roadmap, and syncs your deadlines with Google Calendar and Notion.

problem.title: Your business is scattered across ten tabs.
problem.body: Revenue spread over four platforms, messages everywhere, deadlines you track from memory. You spend more time managing than invoicing.

solution.title: Voraly brings everything onto a single dashboard.
solution.body: Connect your accounts once. Voraly aggregates your revenue, projects and deadlines in real time — and the AI tells you what to do next.

dashboard.title: Real-time dashboard
dashboard.description: Revenue, active projects and performance consolidated live, across every platform.

roadmap.title: Strategic AI roadmap
roadmap.description: A personalized roadmap, generated by AI, to grow your revenue month after month.

multi.title: Multi-platform
multi.description: Upwork, Fiverr, Malt, LinkedIn: connect everything, run it from one screen.

deadlines.title: Deadline tracking
deadlines.description: Synced with Google Calendar and Notion. Never miss a deadline again.

howItWorks.title: Centralize your freelance platforms in 3 steps.

step1.title: Connect your platforms
step1.desc: Link Upwork, Fiverr, Malt and LinkedIn in a few clicks, securely.

step2.title: Let the AI analyze
step2.desc: Voraly cross-references your data and generates your growth roadmap.

step3.title: Steer and get paid
step3.desc: Track your metrics, hit your deadlines, focus on what matters.

metrics.title: Why freelancers choose Voraly.
metrics.callout: Built for freelancers who want to take back control of their business — without juggling ten tabs.

ai.body: Voraly's AI analyzes your projects, your rates and your platforms, then builds a concrete roadmap: which services to push, which rates to adjust, which platforms to prioritize. Your deadlines sync automatically with your calendar.

q1.a: Upwork, Fiverr, Malt and LinkedIn from day one, with new integrations every month. Your deadlines sync with Google Calendar and Notion.

q2.a: Your connections are encrypted and we never store your platform credentials. You stay in full control and can disconnect an account at any time.

q3.q: How does the AI roadmap work?
q3.a: The AI analyzes your revenue, your projects and your rates to generate a personalized roadmap, updated as your activity evolves.

q4.a: You start for free, no credit card. The Pro plan unlocks the advanced AI roadmap and unlimited integrations.

q5.q: How long does it take to get started?
q5.a: About two minutes: create your account, connect your platforms, and your dashboard fills in automatically.

q6.a: Yes. No commitment — cancel your Pro subscription in one click from your settings.

finalCta.body: Join the freelancers who run their business with Voraly. Free, no credit card.
